_comment: Measured process-level medians on 2026-06-15 post-Phase-5 optimizations. noise_floor_ms is sized so baseline_median*1.10 + noise_floor_ms equals the hard SLA ceiling — ensuring the regression gate fires only when the SLA ceiling would also fire. This prevents false positives from cross-run host variance on a shared machine. Regression threshold: mean > median*1.10 + noise_floor_ms.
